short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal may shift US focus
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; Iran deal uncertainty and Israeli strikes on Beirut risk diverting US attention and resources away from Ukraine support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War on Ukrainian territory continues with no qualitative change this cycle; daily life remains defined by air strikes, mobilization, and infrastructure risk.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal imminent; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: An unresolved Iran deal keeps US diplomatic focus split between Middle East and Ukraine; prolonged uncertainty risks delaying or reducing Western military and financial support for Ukraine.

top_events.title: EU formally set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU advancing accession talks is a meaningful positive signal for Ukraine's long-term future and morale, though it has no immediate impact on the war.
